节点.功能描述: Called when page turning mode is set.
Called when page turning mode is set.

Descriptive animation. Anonymous Object Rectification. and the boolean type enables default spring animation.

节点.功能描述: Define scroll snap options
Set scroll snap alignment.

Set snap positions. When the type of snapPositions is Dimension, Scroll content is paginated by an integer multiple of snapPositions. When the type of snapPositions is Array<number>, Scroll content is paginated based on the array of snapPositions.
Set whether the beginning of the Scroll content counts an a snap.
Set whether the end of the Scroll content counts an a snap.
Provides interfaces for scrollable containers.
Called when a scrollable container is set.
The data returned by the event handler when onScrollFrameBegin.
Actual sliding amount, unit vp. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Defines the scroll attribute functions.

Called when the setting slides to the specified position.
Called when the Scroll will scroll.
Called when the Scroll did scroll. xOffset and yOffset are offsets this frame did scroll, scrollState is current scroll state.

Called when scrolling start. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Called when scrolling has stopped.

节点.功能描述: Called before scroll to allow developer to control real offset the Scroll can scroll. same as (xOffset, yOffset) when no OffsetResult is returned.

@param { number } yOffset - vertical offset this frame will scroll, which may or may not be reached.
@param { ScrollSource } scrollSource - source of current scroll.
@returns { void | OffsetResult } the remain offset for the Scroll,
